title: lecanopteris latilobata
intro: Lecanopteris latilobata is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the 'Himalayan basket fern' or 'Chinese basket fern.' It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, Lecanopteris latilobata is often used in infusions, decoctions, or combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
